================================================================================
                            DATA LOGGING
================================================================================

Master Log File:           .cache/youtube-dms.jsonl
  • Format:               JSONL (one record per line)
  • Total Records:        17
  • File Size:            ~8.5 KB
  • Retention:            Full history

State File:               .cache/.youtube-dms-state.json
  • Tracks:              Last processed IDs, lifetime stats
  • Updates:             Every hour
  • Current Entries:      Last 100 processed IDs

Hourly Report:            .cache/youtube-dms-hourly-report.json
  • Format:              JSON
  • Contents:            This hour's stats + lifetime totals
  • Generated:           Every hour
  • Archived:            Timestamped copies for trend analysis

Execution Log:            .cache/youtube-dm-hourly-cron.log
  • Format:              Text (append-only)
  • Contains:            All cron executions with timestamps
  • Useful for:          Debugging, compliance, audit trail

================================================================================
                         RESPONSE TEMPLATES
================================================================================

Template 1: Setup Help
  → Provides resource links + support offer
  → Used for: Installation issues, configuration questions
  → Trigger: Keywords like "error", "help", "stuck", "setup"

Template 2: Newsletter
  → Confirms signup + lists benefits
  → Used for: Email list subscriptions
  → Trigger: Keywords like "email list", "newsletter", "subscribe"

Template 3: Product Inquiry
  → Highlights features, pricing, demo options
  → Used for: Purchase intent, feature questions
  → Trigger: Keywords like "pricing", "buy", "features", "demo"

Template 4: Partnership
  → Acknowledges interest + escalates to team
  → Used for: Collaboration opportunities
  → Trigger: Keywords like "partner", "collaborate", "sponsor"
